description: Using the Fells Loop dataset, create a route named 'Survey-Legs' connecting all waypoints in sequence. Identify the longest leg of this route and create a waypoint named 'Resupply-Point' at its midpoint. Generate a distance summary report at C:\workspace\output\distance_report.txt including details for each leg, the total distance, and an identification of the longest leg. Export the 'Survey-Legs' route, all original waypoints, and the 'Resupply-Point' waypoint to C:\workspace\output\resupply_plan.gpx.
